summaryAm: ትንሽ ጓደኛ እንኳን ትልቅ እርዳታ ሊያደርግ እንደሚችል የሚያሳይ ለልጆች የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ደግነት አይጠፋም፤ ትንሽ እርዳታም ትልቅ ደስታ ታመጣለች።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened danger.

pages.textAm: በሞቃት ሜዳ ውስጥ አንድ ትልቅ አንበሳ በዛፍ ጥላ ሥር አርፎ ነበር። ነፋሱ በቀስታ ይነፍስ ነበር።
pages.textEn: In a warm meadow, a big lion rested under the shade of a tree.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle lion resting peacefully under an acacia-like tree in a warm meadow.

pages.textAm: ትንሽ አይጥ በደስታ ሲሮጥ ወደ አንበሳው ጀርባ ወጣ። አንበሳው ነቃና በጣም ተገረመ።
pages.textEn: A tiny mouse ran happily and climbed onto the lion's back.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A tiny mouse accidentally climbing on a surprised but gentle lion's back.

pages.textAm: “እባክህ አትቆጣብኝ፣” አለ አይጡ። “አንድ ቀን እኔም ልረዳህ እችላለሁ።”
pages.textEn: Please do not be angry, said the mouse. One day I may help you too.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tiny mouse speaking kindly to the lion, asking for patience.

pages.textAm: አንበሳው በለስላሳ ፈገግታ ተመለከተው። “አንተ ትንሽ ነህ፣ ግን ደግ ልብ አለህ” ብሎ አይጡን ለቀቀው።
pages.textEn: The lion smiled softly and let the little mouse go.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The lion gently letting the mouse go in a safe, warm storybook scene.

pages.textAm: በሌላ ቀን አንበሳው በደረቅ ቅርንጫፎች መካከል ተጣብቆ ቀረ። “እርዳታ!” ብሎ በቀስታ ጠራ።
pages.textEn: Another day, the lion got stuck among dry branches and called for help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The lion gently stuck among dry branches, worried but safe and not frightening.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ አይጥ ድምፁን ሰማ። በፍጥነት መጥቶ ቅርንጫፎቹን በትንንሽ ጥርሶቹ መክፈት ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: The little mouse heard him and hurried over to help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tiny mouse carefully nibbling dry branches to help the lion get free.

pages.textAm: ብዙም ሳይቆይ አንበሳው ነፃ ሆነ። “አመሰግናለሁ፣ ትንሽ ጓደኛዬ” አለ በደስታ።
pages.textEn: Soon the lion was free and thanked his little friend.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The lion free again, smiling gratefully at the little mouse.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን ጀምሮ አንበሳው እና አይጡ ጥሩ ጓደኞች ሆኑ። አንበሳውም ትንሽ ደግነት ትልቅ እርዳታ እንደምትሆን ተማረ።
pages.textEn: From that day on, the lion and the mouse became good friends.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The lion and mouse sitting together as friends in golden meadow light.
